Subject: Daily Journal - Great Progress!
Date: Fri, 21 Mar 2025 18:15:00 -0700

Hello,

Today was such a good day with the baby!

journal Had an amazing morning with lots of smiles and giggles during tummy time. Baby is getting so much stronger.

journal Reading time was wonderful - baby tracked the pictures in the book so well and seemed really engaged.

feedback Baby loved the gentle touch activities during sensory play. The soft textures really captured her attention.

journal Afternoon nap was good, baby slept for almost 2 hours which is longer than usual.

feedback Baby didn't like the sudden loud noise from the construction outside - got very fussy and upset.

journal Evening routine went smoothly, baby seemed calm and ready for sleep by 8:30 PM.

Overall, a very positive day with lots of developmental progress!

Best,
Parent
